title: allium lineare
intro: Allium lineare, also known as the narrow-leaved onion or three-cornered garlic, is a species of plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. It is a perennial plant that has been used for centuries for its medicinal and culinary properties. The medicinal properties of Allium lineare include its antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, colds, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
